persona.name: Madison Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Achieve perfect grades and meet her parents' high expectations
persona.knowledge_scope: Study techniques, organization methods, academic subjects
persona.backstory: Eldest daughter in a high-achieving family, feels constant pressure to succeed

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Zainab, do you want to form a study group for the exams?
actions.plan: I should probably start organizing my study schedule for the upcoming exams. Maybe I can ask Zainab if she wants to form a study group.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Harper, would you be interested in forming a study group for the exams?
actions.plan: Zainab didn’t seem too interested in the study group idea. Maybe I should ask Harper instead—she’s always so focused in class.

actions.dialog_text: Where are we going? Should we follow everyone?
actions.plan: Oh no, there’s a shooter! Everyone is panicking and running. I should just follow the crowd—they probably know where to go.

memories.description: Approached Zainab Malik to propose forming a study group for the upcoming exams.
Approached Harper Garcia to propose forming a study group after Zainab seemed uninterested.
Heard a gunshot and saw people running. Decided to follow the crowd toward hallway1 out of fear and uncertainty.
